title: Verify content is accessible when trial is active
description: Test that all content sections in Trial Corner are accessible for users with active trial status
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner Hub

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Trial Corner Hub with active trial
2. Scroll through content sections (Progress & Benefits, Engagement, Trending)
3. Attempt to play content from each section

expected_result: All content is accessible and playable for active trial users. Hero shows remaining days, content sections display full library
